_instructions: Add new tools to the 'tools' array. Each tool needs: title, desc, icon (see icon list in main.js), tag (CSS | JS | Design | Dev | AI), and optionally a 'url' if it links out.

tools.title: CSS Animation Playground
tools.desc: Experiment with keyframes, transitions, and transforms — edit live and see results instantly.

tools.title: Flexbox Visualizer
tools.desc: Toggle every Flexbox property and see the layout change in real time with live code output.

tools.title: Grid Layout Builder
tools.desc: Visually design CSS Grid templates — columns, rows, gaps — and copy the generated code.

tools.title: Color Palette Generator
tools.desc: Generate harmonious color palettes from a base hue and export as CSS custom properties.

tools.title: Typography Scale Builder
tools.desc: Pick a base size and scale ratio to build a full modular type scale with exportable CSS.

tools.title: JS DOM Explorer
tools.desc: Interactive demos for selecting, traversing, and manipulating DOM elements step by step.

tools.title: API Fetch Tester
tools.desc: Type any public API URL, fire a GET request, and inspect the formatted JSON response.

tools.title: Regex Tester
tools.desc: Write regular expressions and test them against sample text with live match highlighting.
